declarations.description: Mobile number input web component built on jb-input. It accepts Persian digits, removes non-numeric characters, normalizes Iranian mobile numbers to a 09xxxxxxxxx value, formats display as 09xx xxxxxxx, and adds built-in mobile-number validation.
declarations.name: JBMobileInputWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial or reflected mobile value. Prefer the value property for controlled updates. The stored value is normalized without spaces.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label text and accessible aria label inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper text shown below the input when no validation error is visible.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text forwarded to the inner native input.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Enables required validation. A string value is used as the required validation message.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: External validation error message inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: disable-auto-validation
attributes.description: Stops automatic validation inherited from jb-input.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size variant inherited from jb-input.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical normalized value without spaces, for example 09123456789.

members.name: displayValue
members.description: Formatted value rendered in the input, for example 0912 3456789.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper inherited from jb-input with an added mobile-number validation.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when current value differs from initialValue.

members.name: validationMessage
members.description: Current native validation message from ElementInternals.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation and shows the first error message.

methods.name: setSelectionRange
methods.description: Forwards setSelectionRange to the inner native input.

methods.name: addStandardValueCallback
methods.description: Inherited jb-input standardization extension point. jb-mobile-input already registers its own mobile standardizer.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched on each user input after value standardization.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the value is committed.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Cancelable event dispatched before the native input changes.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when validation finds an invalid value.

slots.name: start-section
slots.description: Inherited jb-input slot rendered before the native input.

slots.name: end-section
slots.description: Inherited jb-input slot rendered after the native input.

cssParts.name: label
cssParts.description: The label element inherited from jb-input.

cssParts.name: input-box
cssParts.description: The wrapper around slots and inner input inherited from jb-input.

cssParts.name: input
cssParts.description: The inner native input inherited from jb-input.

cssParts.name: message
cssParts.description: The helper or validation message element inherited from jb-input.

cssProperties.name: --jb-mobile-input-input-direction
cssProperties.description: Direction of the inner input text. Default is ltr.
